title: HitColor
description: This mod allows the player to change the player's color when dealing damage to him to absolutely any color (Hex-Code) and transparency!
body:
# Descriptions:

**[ENG]** This mod allows the player to change the player's color when dealing damage to him to absolutely any color (Hex-Code) and transparency!

#  

**[RUS]** Данный мод дает возможность игроку поменять цвет игрока при нанесении урона ему на абсолютно любой цвет (Hex-Code) и прозрачность!

# For Questions etc.:

[Issue / Questions / Ideas](https://github.com/deadlyPig/HitColor/issues)

# See also [BrushClient](https://modrinth.com/mod/brush-client)
